name: plugadvpl-marketplace
description: Marketplace do plugadvpl — plugin Claude Code + CLI para ADVPL/TLPP (TOTVS Protheus): indexa fontes em SQLite/FTS5, compila via advpls, edita .prw cp1252 sem corromper acentos, guarda credenciais no cofre do OS.

plugins.name: plugadvpl
plugins.description: Plugin Claude Code + CLI pra ADVPL/TLPP (Protheus): indexa em SQLite/FTS5, compila via advpls, edita .prw cp1252 e guarda credenciais no cofre do OS. ~16× menos contexto.
